data.content:
Tests ran only on `net9.0` using:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

The `--framework` (or `-f`) flag restricts the run to a single target framework. The build succeeded, though no tests were discovered — the project may be missing a test adapter package (e.g., `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk`, `MSTest.TestAdapter`, `xunit.runner.visualstudio`, etc.).
